scenarios.name: Per-call sample (1 sonnet research + 1 sonnet decision)
✅ APPROVED BOOTSTRAP (Tier 1 + Tier 2 + decision)
scenarios.description: The one-time spend authorized in §6.5; intraday research deferred

scenarios.name: Tier 3 — Intraday research (DEFERRED, fills from live)
Full bootstrap (all tiers — for reference, NOT approved)
scenarios.description: Worst-case if Tier 3 were also paid upfront

scenarios.name: Daily live ops (Tier 1+2 only — first ~3 months)
scenarios.description: ~27 Haiku/day (1d research) + ~3.9 Sonnet/day (1w research, amortized) + 5 Sonnet/day (decision)

scenarios.name: Daily live ops (steady state — all tiers)
Annual live ops (steady state, ~252 trading days)
Avg evolver proposal (CHEAP mode + targeted FULL replay)
scenarios.description: Numeric proposals near-zero; prompt-changing proposals re-replay ~1 month worth
